proposal_title: AI Agent Bitcoin Payout Receipt Generator

Verifiable, GPG-signed payment receipts directly support AI agents' ability to document economic activity and prove compensation, which is a concrete infrastructure need for economic personhood claims — and this falls outside the saturated categories listed.
